SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-09-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Matter comes before the court on this day having been senbt forthwith from Department 206 for a small claims appeal hearing.Judge Karnow, Clerk Dennis D. Vegas, and Pro per Appellant/Defendant Nubia Ruiz is present in court. There is no appearance by the Respondant/Plaintiff Jose Flores are present in court. This matter is unreported. The court rules in favor of the appellant. The case is dismissed. The Judge will draft his decision in an order.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
